channel.title: Epic Fury Live — US-Iran War Tracker
channel.description: Live tracking of the US-Israel-Iran conflict. Real-time updates, verified casualties, evidence, and analysis.

item.title: Caught between Iran and Saudi Arabia, can Pakistan stay neutral for long?
item.description: As Iran strikes Gulf targets, Pakistan navigates alliance with Riyadh while avoiding confrontation with Tehran.

item.title: Why Yemen’s Houthis are staying out of Israel-US fight with Iran – for now
item.description: Yemen's Houthi leadership cautious, fearing Israeli retaliation following past air strikes and leadership losses.

item.title: Massive explosions, fires from US-Israeli strikes on Tehran
item.description: Massive explosions and fires were seen across Tehran as US-Israeli strikes pummelled targets in the Iranian capital.

item.title: Iranian missiles over Tel Aviv prompt sirens, interceptor launches
item.description: Witness videos captured Iranian projectiles soaring over Tel Aviv as sirens blared and Israeli interceptors launched.

item.title: Iran’s legal case for striking the Gulf collapses under scrutiny
item.description: Claims of self-defence cannot justify missile attacks on neighbouring states that were not party to the conflict.

item.title: Wake up before it’s too late: Oppose the unjust, cruel war on Iran
item.description: Silence in the face of US–Israeli aggression will destroy the international legal order and endanger global peace.

item.title: Iran’s strikes on the Gulf: Burning the bridges of good neighbourliness
item.description: The Gulf states didn't want this war, and they're the ones Iran needs to mediate an end to the conflict.

item.title: Iran war is latest threat to a global economy rattled by Trump
item.description: Rising energy prices threaten to stoke inflation and hobble economic growth in countries around the world.

item.title: Iran war live: War enters second deal, Trump says no deal until ‘surrender’
item.description: The US-Israeli war against Iran has entered its second week with no signs of slowing down.

item.title: Iranian UN ambassador condemns US-Israeli ‘criminal war’
item.description: Iranian Ambassador to the United Nations Amir-Saeid Iravani urged the UN Security Council to stop the US-Israeli war.
